english-coach.description: Rewrites prompts in natural English with vocabulary tips

prompt-logger.description: Logs all prompts to MinIO for analytics (non-blocking)

tool-analytics.description: Tracks tool usage metrics via HTTP endpoint

security-gate.description: AI-powered security check for dangerous shell commands
security-gate.prompt:
You are a security auditor. Analyze this tool call and determine if it's safe.

Tool: $ARGUMENTS

Respond with {"decision": "allow"} if safe, or {"decision": "deny", "reason": "..."} if dangerous.

Dangerous patterns: rm -rf /, chmod 777, curl | sh, eval on untrusted input, writing to /etc, killing system processes.

commit-guard.description: Prevents committing sensitive files (env, keys, credentials)

post-edit-lint.description: Runs linter after file edits via HTTP hook server

session-context.description: Loads project context at session start via HTTP

code-review-agent.description: Agent-based code review for file modifications
code-review-agent.prompt:
Review the code change that just happened. Check for:
1. Security vulnerabilities (injection, XSS, etc.)
2. Logic errors or edge cases
3. Performance issues

Use Read and Grep tools to examine the modified file. Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "..."} only if there's a critical issue, otherwise return {}.

teammate-idle-check.description: Validates teammate work when going idle, sends back for more if incomplete
teammate-idle-check.prompt:
A teammate is about to go idle. Review their recent work:

$ARGUMENTS

If the teammate has completed their assigned task satisfactorily, respond with {}.
If there is clearly unfinished work, respond with {"decision": "block", "reason": "Please complete: <specific unfinished items>"}.

task-completion-validator.description: Validates task completion by checking deliverables before marking done
task-completion-validator.prompt:
A task is being marked as completed. Verify the deliverables:

$ARGUMENTS

Use Read and Grep to check:
1. Were the expected files created/modified?
2. Does the code compile (check for syntax errors)?
3. Are there any TODO/FIXME comments left behind?

Return {} if everything looks good, or {"decision": "block", "reason": "..."} if the task is incomplete.

team-activity-log.description: Logs team activity (subagent start/stop) for analytics
